instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Step 2 of the two-step admin transfer: the nominated admin accepts and becomes
the active admin.

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here. The signer-to-vote-account binding is proved in the handler
via the meta merkle proof: voting_wallet == signer AND vote_account ==
spl_vote_account, both anchored to proposal.consensus_result.

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here. The signer here is the delegator (not the validator); the
handler proves stake_merkle_leaf.voting_wallet == signer and binds the
stake leaf to this vote account via the two-tier merkle proof
(stake_merkle_root nested inside meta_merkle_leaf).

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here; the handler then deserializes VoteStateVersions and requires
node_pubkey == signer, proving the signer operates this vote account.

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: to the proposal by the init_ballot_box CPI's PDA seed check, which re-derives
[b"proposal", proposal_seed, spl_vote_account] against the signing proposal
PDA. A mismatched vote account is therefore rejected regardless of who signs
this instruction (the signer is the admin, not necessarily the author).

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here. The signer-to-vote-account binding is proved in the handler
via the meta merkle proof: voting_wallet == signer AND vote_account ==
spl_vote_account, both anchored to proposal.consensus_result.

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here. The signer here is the delegator (not the validator); the
handler proves stake_merkle_leaf.voting_wallet == signer and binds the
stake leaf to this vote account via the two-tier merkle proof
(stake_merkle_root nested inside meta_merkle_leaf).

instructions.name: nominate_admin
docs: Step 1 of the two-step admin transfer: the current admin nominates a new admin.
The transfer only completes once the nominee calls `accept_admin`.

accounts.name: spl_vote_account
docs: enforced here; the handler then deserializes VoteStateVersions and requires
node_pubkey == signer, so a supporter can only pledge stake from a vote
account they operate.

errors.name: NotEnoughStake
errors.msg: Insufficient stake to perform this action

errors.name: TitleEmpty
errors.msg: The title of the proposal cannot be empty

errors.name: TitleTooLong
errors.msg: The title of the proposal is too long, max 200 bytes

errors.name: DescriptionEmpty
errors.msg: The description of the proposal cannot be empty

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: The description of the proposal is too long, max 500 bytes

errors.name: DescriptionInvalid
errors.msg: The description of the proposal must point to a github link

errors.name: InvalidProposalId
errors.msg: Invalid proposal ID

errors.name: VotingNotStarted
errors.msg: Voting on proposal not yet started

errors.name: ProposalClosed
errors.msg: Proposal voting period has ended

errors.name: ProposalFinalized
errors.msg: Proposal has already been finalized

errors.name: InvalidVoteDistribution
errors.msg: Vote distribution must add up to 100% in Basis Points

errors.name: VotingPeriodNotEnded
errors.msg: Voting period not yet ended

errors.name: InvalidVoteAccount
errors.msg: Invalid vote account

errors.name: FailedDeserializeNodePubkey
errors.msg: Failed to deserialize node_pubkey from Vote account

errors.name: VoteNodePubkeyMismatch
errors.msg: Deserialized node_pubkey from Vote accounts does not match

errors.name: NotEnoughAccounts
errors.msg: Not enough accounts for tally

errors.name: InvalidClusterStake
errors.msg: Cluster stake cannot be zero

errors.name: InvalidStartEpoch
errors.msg: Start epoch must be current or future epoch

errors.name: InvalidVotingLength
errors.msg: Voting length must be bigger than 0

errors.name: InvalidVoteAccountVersion
errors.msg: Invalid Vote account version

errors.name: InvalidVoteAccountSize
errors.msg: Invalid Vote account size

errors.name: InvalidStakeAccount
errors.msg: Invalid stake account

errors.name: InvalidStakeState
errors.msg: Invalid stake account state

errors.name: InvalidStakeAccountSize
errors.msg: Invalid Stake account size

errors.name: InvalidSnapshotProgram
errors.msg: Invalid Snapshot program: provided program ID does not match the expected Merkle Verifier Service program

errors.name: UnauthorizedMerkleRootUpdate
errors.msg: Only the original proposal author can add the merkle root hash

errors.name: MerkleRootAlreadySet
errors.msg: Merkle root hash is already set for this proposal

errors.name: InvalidMerkleRoot
errors.msg: Merkle root hash cannot be all zeros

errors.name: InvalidSnapshotSlot
errors.msg: Invalid snapshot slot: snapshot slot must be past or current slot

errors.name: MustBeOwnedBySnapshotProgram
errors.msg: Account must be owned by Snapshot program

errors.name: InvalidConsensusResultPDA
errors.msg: Invalid consensus result PDA

errors.name: CannotDeserializeMetaMerkleProofPDA
errors.msg: Cannot deserialize MetaMerkleProof PDA

errors.name: CannotDeserializeConsensusResult
errors.msg: Cannot deserialize ConsensusResult

errors.name: CannotModifyAfterStart
errors.msg: Cannot modify proposal after voting has started

errors.name: VotingLengthTooLong
errors.msg: Voting length exceeds maximum allowed epochs

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow occurred

errors.name: SnapshotProgramUpgraded
errors.msg: Snapshot program has been upgraded, update protection triggered

errors.name: MerkleRootNotSet
errors.msg: Merkle root hash has not been set for this proposal

errors.name: SupportPeriodExpired
errors.msg: Support period has expired for this proposal

errors.name: NotInSupportPeriod
errors.msg: Not within the support period

errors.name: ConsensusResultNotSet
errors.msg: Consensus result has not been set for this proposal

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: caller is not authorized to perform this action

errors.name: ProposalNotInVotingPhase
errors.msg: Proposal is not in voting phase

errors.name: InvalidVoteOverrideCache
errors.msg: Invalid vote override cache

errors.name: StakeAccountOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Stake account owner mismatch

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Unauthorized: only the admin can perform this action

errors.name: InvalidProgram
errors.msg: Invalid program

errors.name: InvalidClusterSupportPctMin
errors.msg: Invalid cluster support percentage minimum in basis points (must be between 0 and 10,000)

errors.name: InvalidMaxTitleLength
errors.msg: Invalid max title length (must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 200)

errors.name: InvalidMaxDescriptionLength
errors.msg: Invalid max description length (must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to 500)

errors.name: InvalidAdmin
errors.msg: Admin cannot be the default (all-zero) pubkey

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin nomination exists to accept

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Signer is not the pending admin nominee

errors.name: InvalidBallotBox
errors.msg: Invalid ballot box: provided account does not match the expected BallotBox PDA for the snapshot slot

errors.name: SnapshotSlotNotInFuture
errors.msg: Snapshot slot must be in the future (greater than the current slot)

fields.name: admin
docs: The admin pubkey who can update this config

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: A pending admin nominated by the current admin. The transfer only completes
once this key signs `accept_admin`. `None` when no transfer is in progress.

fields.name: max_title_length
docs: Maximum length for proposal titles

fields.name: max_description_length
docs: Maximum length for proposal descriptions

fields.name: max_support_epochs
docs: Maximum epochs allowed for support phase (0 means same epoch as creation)

fields.name: min_proposal_stake_lamports
docs: Minimum stake in lamports required to create a proposal

fields.name: cluster_support_pct_min_bps
docs: Minimum cluster support percentage in BASIS POINTS (1 bp = 0.01%)

fields.name: discussion_epochs
docs: Number of full epochs reserved for discussion

fields.name: voting_epochs
docs: Number of epochs for voting period

fields.name: snapshot_epoch_extension
docs: Epochs of extension for snapshot

fields.name: snapshot_slot_offset
docs: Slot offset from epoch start for snapshot computation (can be negative)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: author
docs: The public key of the validator who created this proposal

fields.name: for_votes_lamports
docs: Total lamports voted in favor of this proposal

fields.name: against_votes_lamports
docs: Total lamports voted against this proposal

fields.name: abstain_votes_lamports
docs: Total lamports that abstained from voting on this proposal

fields.name: snapshot_slot
docs: Slot number when the validator stake snapshot was taken

fields.name: voting_wallet
docs: Wallet designated for governance voting for the stake account.

fields.name: stake_account
docs: The stake account address.

fields.name: active_stake
docs: Active delegated stake amount.
